name: liblwp-mediatypes-perl
title: liblwp-mediatypes-perl
summary: module to guess media type for a file or a URL
description:
module to guess media type for a file or a URL
LWP::MediaTypes provides functions for handling media (also known as MIME)
types and encodings. The mapping from file extensions to media types is
defined by the media.types file. If the ~/.media.types file exists it is used
instead. For backwards compatibility it will also look for ~/.mime.types.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use liblwp-mediatypes-perl because module to guess media type for a file or a URL.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use liblwp-mediatypes-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair liblwp-mediatypes-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `liblwp-mediatypes-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
